scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,game -c cyan,green,magenta "corepack pnpm --filter @aetherion/web-client dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @aetherion/api-server dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @aetherion/game-server dev"
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @aetherion/shared-types build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @aetherion/shared-types build && corepack pnpm -r test
